text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! Youre approved as a moderator. Please take a moment to read the community guidelines and say hello in the introductions channel.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! Youre approved as an event_helper. Thanks for joining — please check the event coordination notes and introduce yourself when you can.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! Youre approved as a mentor. Glad to have you with us — please review the mentorship guidelines and share a quick intro in the welcome channel.
